notes: All 12 declarations are sorry-free; the file is a clean algebraic-geometric scaffold for T-II-2-009 / Silverman II.2.6(b), building from abstract Dedekind-domain lemmas (Pieces 1-5, thin mathlib wrappers) up to the curve-specific pieces (6-8). The one set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 on primesOverFinset_card_eq_degree_of_unramified has no justifying comment. The file deliberately defers the Module.Free typeclass diamond for inertiaDeg=1 (Piece 9) to ResidueFieldAtSmoothPoint.lean; the four 'unused' declarations in this file are the primary API consumed by that downstream file.
